game.minesweeper.controls: [↑]/[↓]/[←]/[→] Move Cursor  [Space] Open Cell  [Z] Mark/Unmark Mine  [X] Mark/Unmark Suspect  [C] Toggle Guide  [P] Adjust Config  [D] Quick Jump  [S] Save  [R] Restart  [Q]/[ESC] Exit
game.minesweeper.description: Use number clues to deduce and mark all mine locations, clearing all safe areas.
game.minesweeper.details:
f%Open all safe cells and avoid every mine to win.

{tc:yellow}Difficulty:{tc:clear}
{tc:#ff7f27}Level 1:{tc:clear} 9 * 9, 10 mines
{tc:#ff7f27}Level 2:{tc:clear} 16 * 16, 40 mines
{tc:#ff7f27}Level 3:{tc:clear} 15 * 30, 99 mines

{tc:yellow}Press P Configuration:{tc:clear}
{tc:light_cyan}Preset:{tc:clear} difficulty 1-3
{tc:light_cyan}Custom:{tc:clear} rows cols mines (1 - rows*cols-1)

{tc:yellow}Board Limits:{tc:clear}
{tc:light_cyan}Rows:{tc:clear} 2 - 22
{tc:light_cyan}Cols:{tc:clear} 2 - 32

{tc:yellow}Symbols:{tc:clear}
# Fog, unknown cell.
{tc:#b4b4b4}.{tc:clear} Empty cell, no mines in the surrounding eight tiles.
{tc:rgb(0,0,255)}1{tc:clear} / {tc:rgb(0,130,0)}2{tc:clear} / {tc:rgb(255,0,0)}3{tc:clear} / {tc:rgb(0,0,132)}4{tc:clear} / {tc:rgb(132,0,0)}5{tc:clear} / {tc:rgb(0,130,132)}6{tc:clear} / {tc:white}7{tc:clear} / {tc:white}8{tc:clear} Numbers showing how many mines are in the surrounding eight tiles.
{tc:rgb(255,165,0)}!{tc:clear} Flag marking the cell as a mine.
{tc:rgb(0,140,255)}?{tc:clear} Suspect marker for a possible mine.
{tc:rgb(255,0,0)}@{tc:clear} Mine.

{tc:yellow}Controls:{tc:clear}
{tc:light_cyan}[↑]/[↓]/[←]/[→]{tc:clear} Move cursor
{tc:light_cyan}[Space]{tc:clear} Open cell
{tc:light_cyan}[Z]{tc:clear} Mark/Unmark mine
{tc:light_cyan}[X]{tc:clear} Mark/Unmark suspect
{tc:light_cyan}[C]{tc:clear} Toggle guide
{tc:light_cyan}[P]{tc:clear} Adjust config
{tc:light_cyan}[D]{tc:clear} Quick jump
{tc:light_cyan}[S]{tc:clear} Save
{tc:light_cyan}[R]{tc:clear} Restart
{tc:light_cyan}[Q]/[ESC]{tc:clear} Exit
game.minesweeper.input_config_hint: Enter difficulty number or rows cols mines.
game.minesweeper.input_jump_hint: Enter 'row col' to jump to coordinates.
game.minesweeper.name: Minesweeper
game.minesweeper.runtime_ready: Open a safe cell to begin.
